title: Signature Bath & Dry
desc: Hand bath with hypoallergenic shampoo, conditioning rinse, blow-out and brush — pure spa, tails wagging.

title: Full Dog Grooming
desc: Bath, breed-specific cut, ear clean, nail trim and finishing spritz. Tailored to your pup's coat and temperament.

title: Puppy First Groom
desc: A gentle, confidence-building introduction for puppies — short, calm and full of treats.

title: Nail Clipping & Paw Care
desc: Quick, low-stress nail trims with optional pad balm. Drop-in slots welcome.

title: De-Shed Treatment
desc: Deep-conditioning, undercoat-reducing treatment that leaves your home (and sofa) noticeably calmer.

title: Senior & Sensitive Care
desc: Slower, gentler appointments designed for older dogs and those who need extra patience and reassurance.
